case_title: ANDRES YEH CAUICH VS. SULTAN RESTAURANT, et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAUICH, ANDRES YEH AS TO DEFENDANT SULTAN RESTAURANT, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP IQUBAL HANSIA, AND ZUBAIR I.
